name: System.Expont

documentation.description:
Preconditions in this unit are meant for analysis only, not for run-time
checking, so that the expected exceptions are raised. This is enforced
by setting the corresponding assertion policy to Ignore. Postconditions
and contract cases should not be executed at runtime as well, in order
not to slow down the execution of these functions.

subtypes.name: Big_Integer
subtypes.code: subtype Big_Integer is BI_Ghost.Big_Integer with Ghost;

subprograms.name: Expon
subprograms.code: function Expon (Left : Int; Right : Natural) return Int

generic_instantiations.name: Signed_Conversion
generic_instantiations.code: package Signed_Conversion is new BI_Ghost.Signed_Conversions (Int => Int);
